summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Resume.aii application. All backend APIs and frontend features are working perfectly. Tested landing page, builder interface, template selector, form tabs, ATS scoring, file upload modal, mobile responsiveness, and live preview updates.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (GET /api/) - Status: 200
Backend save resume (POST /api/resume/save) - Status: 200
Backend get resume by ID (GET /api/resume/{id}) - Status: 200
Backend enhance text with AI (POST /api/resume/enhance) - Status: 200
Backend upload resume validation (POST /api/resume/upload) - Status: 400 (expected)
Landing page loads with correct 'Resume.aii' branding
Hero section with 'Build resumes that pass every screen' text
Features grid section with all 6 feature cards
CTA section 'Ready to land your next role?'
Navigation from landing to builder via 'Start Building' button
Builder page split-screen layout (form left, preview right)
Template selector with 3 clickable templates (Classic, Modern, Minimal)
Contact form tab with live preview updates for full name, email, phone, location
Summary tab with text area and live preview updates
Work Experience tab with add/remove functionality and form fields
Education tab with add functionality and form fields
Skills tab with add/remove skills using input + button, badges display correctly
ATS Score meter updates from 0% to 20% as contact fields are filled
Upload resume modal opens and closes correctly
Save resume functionality with success notification
Download PDF button is present and clickable
Mobile view toggle buttons work correctly (form/preview switching)
Mobile responsiveness on 390x844 viewport
Navigation back to home page works correctly
No JavaScript errors or console errors found
